task_completion.description: Set document margins to 0.5 inches on all sides.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Page setup or layout dialog showing 0.5 inches (or equivalent, e.g., 1.27 cm) for top, bottom, left, and right margins, or the ruler visually indicating 0.5-inch margins.

task_completion.description: Set the body text to 11pt Arial font.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text is selected or cursor is in the body text, with the font dropdown showing 'Arial' and the font size dropdown showing '11' in the application ribbon/toolbar.

task_completion.description: Include a right-aligned header with the text 'PI: Smith, John'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The header area is visible at the top of the page containing the exact text 'PI: Smith, John', and the text is aligned to the right margin.

task_completion.description: Remove '[SECTION]' tags and format the specified section titles as bold and italic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The headings 'Specific Aims', 'Significance', 'Innovation', and 'Approach' are visible without the '[SECTION]' text. The headings appear visually bolded and italicized, or the 'B' and 'I' formatting buttons are highlighted when a heading is selected.

task_completion.description: Convert the tab-separated data under the 'Innovation' section into a 4x3 table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visible table with exactly 4 rows and 3 columns is present directly under the 'Innovation' section heading.

task_completion.description: Save the completed document as nih_r01_research_strategy.docx in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the path '~/Documents/TextDocuments/' (or '/home/ga/...') and the filename 'nih_r01_research_strategy.docx', or the application title bar displaying 'nih_r01_research_strategy.docx'.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a GUI word processor application open and being interacted with, rather than a plain text editor or terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent applied formatting using the application's built-in tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Use of the ribbon, menus, or dialog boxes (e.g., font dropdown, table insertion tool, margin settings) to apply formatting, rather than typing markdown or HTML tags.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file as a genuine .docx document using the application's save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog is used to explicitly select the Word/docx format, rather than just renaming a .txt file to .docx in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output path: /home/ga/Documents/TextDocuments/nih_r01_research_strategy.docx. Required margins: 0.5 inches on all sides. Required font: Arial, 11pt. Required header text: 'PI: Smith, John' (right-aligned). Required section titles to be bold and italicized (with '[SECTION]' removed): 'Specific Aims', 'Significance', 'Innovation', 'Approach'. The 'Innovation' section must contain a 4x3 table.
